title: haplophyllum pumiliforme
intro: Haplophyllum pumiliforme, also known as dwarf orsinium, is a small shrub native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Haplophyllum pumiliforme include relief from digestive problems, reduced fever, and improved immune system function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its therapeutic benefits.
